scenarios.description: child(0) on element with no child elements throws IndexOutOfBoundsException (childNodeSize==0 branch)
scenarios.precondition: Element parent = new Element("div"); // no children
pseudocode: TEST TC01 child on empty elements

scenarios.description: child(-1) on element with one child element throws IndexOutOfBoundsException (negative index)
scenarios.precondition: Element parent = new Element("div"); parent.appendElement("span"); // one child

scenarios.description: child(0) returns the only child element when exactly one element child exists (loop-1, valid index)
scenarios.precondition: Element parent = new Element("ul"); Element li = parent.appendElement("li");

scenarios.description: child(1) returns second element when two element children exist (loop-N, valid upper-bound index)
scenarios.precondition: Element parent = new Element("ol"); Element first = parent.appendElement("li"); Element second = parent.appendElement("li");
pseudocode: TEST TC04 child second of two

scenarios.description: child(2) on element with two children throws IndexOutOfBoundsException (index equal size)
scenarios.precondition: Element parent = new Element("ul"); parent.appendElement("li"); parent.appendElement("li");
pseudocode: TEST TC05 child index equal size

scenarios.description: child(0) on element with mixed childNodes filters out non-Element nodes correctly (loop-N filters)
scenarios.precondition: Element parent = new Element("p"); parent.appendText("text"); Element child = parent.appendElement("span"); parent.appendText("more");
pseudocode: TEST TC06 child with mixed nodes
